verses.text: A bishop must be 'blameless,' vigilant, sober, 'apt to teach.' High calling. The overseer must be of proven character.
A bishop must be 'blameless,' vigilant, sober, 'apt to teach.' High calling. The overseer must be of proven character.
A bishop must be 'blameless,' vigilant, sober, 'apt to teach.' High calling. The overseer must be of proven character.
He must rule his own house well; 'if a man know not how to rule his own house,' how shall he care for the church? Home first. Faithfulness at home qualifies for the church.
He must rule his own house well; 'if a man know not how to rule his own house,' how shall he care for the church? Home first. Faithfulness at home qualifies for the church.
Not a novice, lest he be lifted up; of good report among them without. Tested. Office requires maturity and a good name.
Not a novice, lest he be lifted up; of good report among them without. Tested. Office requires maturity and a good name.
Deacons must be grave, not double-tongued, holding 'the mystery of the faith in a pure conscience.' Worthy servants. Their character must match their charge.
Deacons must be grave, not double-tongued, holding 'the mystery of the faith in a pure conscience.' Worthy servants. Their character must match their charge.
Deacons must be grave, not double-tongued, holding 'the mystery of the faith in a pure conscience.' Worthy servants. Their character must match their charge.
Their wives grave and faithful; those who serve well 'purchase to themselves a good degree.' Honoured service. Faithful deacons gain standing and boldness.
Their wives grave and faithful; those who serve well 'purchase to themselves a good degree.' Honoured service. Faithful deacons gain standing and boldness.
Their wives grave and faithful; those who serve well 'purchase to themselves a good degree.' Honoured service. Faithful deacons gain standing and boldness.
I write that thou mayest know how to behave in 'the house of God'; 'God was manifest in the flesh.' Great mystery. The church guards the truth of the incarnate Christ.
